proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for clinical status, biomarkers, and treatments, each 10-year increase in `age_years` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient in months per 10 years of age.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `age_years` per 10 years was +1.68434 months of `pfs_months` (SE 0.00329, p<1e-300), supporting the hypothesized positive association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `sex_female` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `sex_female` equal to 0.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `sex_female`.
analyses.result_summary: `sex_female` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.20347 months (SE 0.00654, p=2.8511e-212), supporting lower PFS among female patients in this cohort.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient per one ECOG performance status point.
analyses.result_summary: `ecog_ps` had an adjusted coefficient of -1.10128 months per point (SE 0.00480, p<1e-300), strongly supporting worse PFS with poorer performance status.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `stage_iv`.
analyses.result_summary: `stage_iv` had an adjusted coefficient of -1.41676 months (SE 0.00681, p<1e-300), supporting substantially shorter PFS in stage IV disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without brain metastases.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `has_brain_mets`.
analyses.result_summary: `has_brain_mets` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.91217 months (SE 0.00750, p<1e-300), supporting shorter PFS with brain metastases.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `histology` equal to `squamous` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `histology` equal to `adenocarcinoma`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with adenocarcinoma as the reference histology.
analyses.result_summary: Squamous histology had an adjusted coefficient of -0.72257 months versus adenocarcinoma (SE 0.00758, p<1e-300), supporting shorter PFS in squamous tumors.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `smoking_status` equal to `current` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `smoking_status` equal to `former`.
After adjustment, patients with `smoking_status` equal to `never` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `smoking_status` equal to `former`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with former smoking as the reference category.
analyses.result_summary: Current smoking had an adjusted coefficient of -0.55143 months versus former smoking (SE 0.00774, p<1e-300), supporting shorter PFS in current smokers.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with former smoking as the reference category.
analyses.result_summary: Never smoking had an adjusted coefficient of -0.00578 months versus former smoking (SE 0.01088, p=0.59492), refuting a higher-PFS never-smoker effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, each 1 g/dL increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient per 1 g/dL albumin.
analyses.result_summary: `albumin_g_dl` had an adjusted coefficient of +0.46267 months per 1 g/dL (SE 0.00649, p<1e-300), supporting higher PFS with higher albumin.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, each 100 U/L increase in `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient per 100 U/L LDH.
analyses.result_summary: `ldh_u_l` per 100 U/L had an adjusted coefficient of -0.04462 months (SE 0.00402, p=1.4996e-28), supporting a modest adverse LDH association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, each 5-percentage-point increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient per 5 percentage points of weight loss.
analyses.result_summary: `weight_loss_pct_6mo` per 5 percentage points had an adjusted coefficient of -0.36597 months (SE 0.00420, p<1e-300), supporting shorter PFS with greater weight loss.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, each 10 mg/L increase in `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.
After adjustment, each one-unit increase in `nlr` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient per 10 mg/L CRP.
analyses.result_summary: `crp_mg_l` per 10 mg/L had an adjusted coefficient of +0.00209 months (SE 0.00357, p=0.55891), refuting an independent adverse CRP association in this model.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient per one NLR unit.
analyses.result_summary: `nlr` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.00009 months per unit (SE 0.00156, p=0.95510), refuting an independent NLR association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `liver_mets` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without liver metastases.
After adjustment, patients with `bone_mets` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without bone metastases.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `liver_mets`.
analyses.result_summary: `liver_mets` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.00487 months (SE 0.00909, p=0.59188), refuting a detectable independent liver-metastasis effect.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `bone_mets`.
analyses.result_summary: `bone_mets` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.00749 months (SE 0.00811, p=0.35574), refuting a detectable independent bone-metastasis effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without `brca2_mutation`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `brca2_mutation`.
analyses.result_summary: `brca2_mutation` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.11027 months (SE 0.01896, p=6.0188e-9), supporting a small adverse BRCA2 association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `stk11_mutation` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients without `stk11_mutation`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `stk11_mutation`.
analyses.result_summary: `stk11_mutation` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.01913 months (SE 0.00913, p=0.036244), supporting a statistically significant but very small adverse association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients without `egfr_mutation`.
After adjustment, patients with `tmb_high` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `tmb_high` equal to 0.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `egfr_mutation`.
analyses.result_summary: `egfr_mutation` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.00030 months (SE 0.01102, p=0.97854), refuting an independent EGFR-positive PFS advantage.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS; effect is coefficient for `tmb_high`.
analyses.result_summary: `tmb_high` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.00524 months (SE 0.00749, p=0.48375), refuting an independent TMB-high PFS advantage.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients without `kras_g12c`.
After adjustment, patients receiving `treatment_sotorasib` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_sotorasib`.

analyses.method: Main-effects multivariable OLS without treatment-biomarker interaction terms.
analyses.result_summary: `kras_g12c` had an adjusted main-effect coefficient of +0.89234 months (SE 0.00990, p<1e-300), supporting a positive association before interaction refinement.

analyses.method: Main-effects multivariable OLS without treatment-biomarker interaction terms.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_sotorasib` had an adjusted main-effect coefficient of +0.32282 months (SE 0.00682, p<1e-300), supporting an apparent overall positive association before KRAS stratification.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 1 than in patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 0.
Among patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 1, those receiving `treatment_sotorasib` have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving `treatment_sotorasib`.
Among patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 0, those receiving `treatment_sotorasib` have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving `treatment_sotorasib`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c` interaction coefficient was +2.53458 months (SE 0.01699, p<1e-300), supporting strong KRAS-specific sotorasib benefit.

analyses.method: KRAS G12C-positive subgroup multivariable OLS.
analyses.result_summary: Within the `kras_g12c` positive subgroup (n=6368), `treatment_sotorasib` had an adjusted coefficient of +2.53227 months (SE 0.03254, p<1e-300), supporting the subgroup benefit.

analyses.method: KRAS G12C-negative subgroup multivariable OLS.
analyses.result_summary: Within the `kras_g12c` negative subgroup (n=43632), `treatment_sotorasib` had an adjusted coefficient of +0.00107 months (SE 0.00327, p=0.74408), refuting meaningful benefit outside KRAS G12C.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `egfr_mutation`.
The positive association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `alk_fusion` equal to 1 than in patients without `alk_fusion`.
The positive association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `stk11_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `stk11_mutation`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_sotorasib * egfr_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_sotorasib * egfr_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.18946 months (SE 0.02027, p=9.2762e-21), supporting attenuation among EGFR-mutated patients.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_sotorasib * alk_fusion` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_sotorasib * alk_fusion` interaction coefficient was -0.32664 months (SE 0.03152, p=3.7154e-25), supporting attenuation among ALK-fusion-positive patients.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_sotorasib * stk11_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_sotorasib * stk11_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.05962 months (SE 0.01911, p=0.0018071), supporting a smaller sotorasib association in STK11-mutated patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `brca2_mutation`.
The positive association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `tmb_high` equal to 1 than in patients with `tmb_high` equal to 0.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_sotorasib * brca2_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_sotorasib * brca2_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.33092 months (SE 0.03966, p=7.2916e-17), supporting attenuation among BRCA2-mutated patients.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_sotorasib * tmb_high` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_sotorasib * tmb_high` interaction coefficient was +0.05868 months (SE 0.01515, p=0.00010727), supporting a small larger association in TMB-high patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` becomes more positive for each 50-point increase in `pdl1_tps`.
The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `tmb_high` equal to 1 than in patients with `tmb_high` equal to 0.
The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is less positive in patients with `stk11_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `stk11_mutation`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_pembrolizumab * pdl1_tps/50` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_pembrolizumab * pdl1_tps/50` interaction coefficient was +0.62665 months per 50 TPS points (SE 1.57024, p=0.68984), refuting a detectable PD-L1 modification effect.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_pembrolizumab * tmb_high` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_pembrolizumab * tmb_high` interaction coefficient was -0.00644 months (SE 0.01473, p=0.66205), refuting greater pembrolizumab association in TMB-high disease.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_pembrolizumab * stk11_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_pembrolizumab * stk11_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.00912 months (SE 0.01868, p=0.62519), refuting a detectable STK11 attenuation of pembrolizumab association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_olaparib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `brca2_mutation`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation` interaction coefficient was +0.00031 months (SE 0.04338, p=0.99423), refuting BRCA2-specific olaparib association in this cohort.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_osimertinib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `egfr_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `egfr_mutation`.
The association between `treatment_osimertinib` and `pfs_months` is more positive in patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 than in patients without brain metastases.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation` interaction coefficient was -0.01785 months (SE 0.02151, p=0.40662), refuting EGFR-specific osimertinib benefit in this dataset.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `treatment_osimertinib * has_brain_mets` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_osimertinib * has_brain_mets` interaction coefficient was +0.02987 months (SE 0.01674, p=0.074352), suggesting but not proving a brain-metastasis-specific difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse association of `has_brain_mets` with `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 compared with patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0.
The adverse association of higher `ecog_ps` with `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 compared with patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `stage_iv * has_brain_mets` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `stage_iv * has_brain_mets` interaction coefficient was +0.09764 months (SE 0.01568, p=4.7908e-10), supporting less-than-additive adverse effects of stage IV and brain metastases.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `stage_iv * ecog_ps` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `stage_iv * ecog_ps` interaction coefficient was +0.10541 months per ECOG point (SE 0.01003, p=7.6913e-26), supporting attenuation of the ECOG penalty in stage IV disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse association of `histology` equal to `squamous` with `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `smoking_status` equal to `current` compared with patients who are not current smokers.
The positive association of `albumin_g_dl` with `pfs_months` is weaker when `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is higher.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `histology_squamous * smoking_current` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The squamous-by-current-smoking interaction coefficient was +0.05167 months (SE 0.01544, p=0.00081694), supporting slight attenuation of the squamous adverse association among current smokers.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with `albumin_g_dl * weight_loss_pct_6mo/5` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The `albumin_g_dl * weight_loss_pct_6mo/5` interaction coefficient was -0.00971 months (SE 0.00837, p=0.24626), refuting a detectable albumin-by-weight-loss interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab`.
After adjustment, patients receiving `treatment_olaparib` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_olaparib`.
After adjustment, patients receiving `treatment_osimertinib` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_osimertinib`.

analyses.method: Main-effects multivariable OLS adjusted for clinical features, biomarkers, and treatments.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_pembrolizumab` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.00563 months (SE 0.00651, p=0.38658), refuting an overall positive association.

analyses.method: Main-effects multivariable OLS adjusted for clinical features, biomarkers, and treatments.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_olaparib` had an adjusted coefficient of +0.00243 months (SE 0.00710, p=0.73207), refuting an overall positive association.

analyses.method: Main-effects multivariable OLS adjusted for clinical features, biomarkers, and treatments.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_osimertinib` had an adjusted coefficient of +0.00119 months (SE 0.00710, p=0.86656), refuting an overall positive association.
